faqData.question: What time should I arrive?
faqData.answer: Please arrive at least 30 minutes before the ceremony start time. This allows time for parking, seating, and getting settled.

faqData.question: Can I bring a plus one?
faqData.answer: Plus ones are welcome if they were included in your invitation. Please check your RSVP for the exact number of guests.

faqData.question: Is there a dress code?
faqData.answer: Yes, the dress code is formal attire (black tie optional). We want everyone to feel elegant and comfortable.

faqData.question: Are children welcome?
faqData.answer: We love children, but this will be an adults-only celebration. We appreciate you making arrangements for childcare.

faqData.question: What type of food will be served?
faqData.answer: We will be serving a plated dinner with multiple course options. Please indicate any dietary restrictions when you RSVP, and we'll do our best to accommodate your needs.

faqData.question: Is there parking available?
faqData.answer: Yes, both venues have parking available. The ceremony venue has on-site parking, and the reception venue offers valet parking.

faqData.question: Can I take photos during the ceremony?
faqData.answer: We kindly ask that you refrain from taking photos during the ceremony. Our professional photographer will capture all the special moments, and we'll share the photos with everyone afterward.

faqData.question: What's the best way to RSVP?
faqData.answer: Please use the RSVP button on our website. You can also contact us directly if you have any issues with the online RSVP system.
